Paper Title: The Evolution of Hackathons as an Innovation Tool: A Systematic Analysis

Limitation / Gap: No longitudinal studies; poor long-term sustainability assessment; geographical bias

Authors: Falk, J., Chen, Y., Rafner, J., Zhang, M., Bjerva, J., Nolte, A.

Limitation / Gap: Automated creativity assessment still challenging; requires validation

Authors: Sajja, R., Ramirez, C.E., Li, Z., Demiray, B., Sermet, Y., Demir, I.
